name: Party Mix#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in the barbecue sauce, seasonings (garlic powder), and toasted sesame seeds.
3. Toast the sesame seeds for 15 minutes at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown.
4. Pour the hot seasoned butter mixture evenly over the dry cereals, pretzel sticks, and mixed nuts.
5. Mix thoroughly to coat all pieces in the seasoned butter.
6. Spread the coated ingredients evenly in a greased baking pan measuring 15.5 x 10.5 x 1.25 inches.
7. Bake at 250°F (125°C) for about an hour, stirring every 15 minutes to ensure even coating.
VARIATION
CURRIED NIBBLERS: Replace the garlic powder with curry powder, add 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and substitute the barbecue sauce with onion salt. Add a dash of cayenne or red pepper flakes for additional heat.
